form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 9 length seventh over 295m at this track. Others rate better this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran interference in early stages and lost ground into home straight.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (23.42) over 390m at Ascot Park. Has a low draw. Can go one better.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start easily by 5.5 lengths at Manawatu (21.23) beating Taylor's Sport in a Class 1 on February 27. Coming out of a very strong form race.

form.formComment: Scored by 5 lengths last time (17.32) in a Class 1 over 295m at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting two places from three starts. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.63) at this track in a Class 1, finishing fourth and beaten 5.5 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and 10 places from 16 starts. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by one length at this track over 295m (17.51) beating Cronus Jewel in Class 0 on March 27. Others have better credentials.
